findings.observation: Only the original clean_peak_percentile row crosses the weak-weighting bar: weak Pd delta 0.0267, hit delta 7.
findings.interpretation: The apparent gain is tied to the original overlap-contaminated definition, not to a repaired definition.
findings.implication: Do not claim repaired weak definition gives stable weak-target weighting benefit.
findings.next_step: Treat original clean_peak result as a diagnostic upper bound and validate repaired definitions before any continuation.

findings.observation: Best repaired row is clean_peak_overlap_aware with weak Pd delta 0.0182 and hit delta 4; 5/5 repaired rows miss the minimum gain or hit-count bar.
findings.interpretation: Repairing overlap reduces contamination but also removes the only bar-clearing weak-weighting gain.
findings.implication: Range-only weak weighting remains weak evidence / negative-result leaning under repaired definitions.
findings.next_step: Record the range-only result conservatively and avoid D6.

findings.observation: RD smoke reduces weak overlap from 0.2786 to 0.1947 and raises weak separability proxy by 24.87 dB.
findings.interpretation: RD gives the clearest feasibility signal for better separability, but this is a smoke proxy without Doppler ground-truth labels.
findings.implication: RD can justify a narrow feasibility follow-up, not a confirmed method claim.
findings.next_step: Run a small RD representation confirmation audit before any training-scale decision.

findings.observation: RA reduces weak overlap to 0.0649, but weak projection hit rate is 0.0305, below range-only 0.3511.
findings.interpretation: RA geometry can separate overlaps but current rough angle projection misses many weak targets.
findings.implication: RA is feasibility evidence only and weaker than RD for next-step priority.
findings.next_step: Keep RA as secondary smoke unless angle-label calibration is improved.

overall_interpretation: repaired weak definitions do not robustly support continuing range-only weak weighting; RD has smoke-only feasibility evidence.
recommended_route: record range-only weak weighting as negative/weak evidence; optionally run a narrow RD feasibility confirmation; do not enter D6.
